## Summary

- Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Why

- What problem does this solve?

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Review Notes

- Call out risky areas, migrations, follow-up work, or places where reviewer focus is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Scope is limited to one logical change
- [ ] Docs/config were updated if needed
- [ ] Screenshots or UI notes were added for user-facing changes
